programme.desc: Molly Ringwald and Judd Nelson lead a line-up of high school enemies who find common ground during detention. Contains discriminatory language. Mature themes.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: In 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: During a taxi ride home, a young woman and her driver speak openly about relationships, power dynamics and loss. Sky Original film with Dakota Johnson and Sean Penn.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen, misunderstood and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: Ralph Fiennes and Julianne Moore star in this intelligent tale of romance amid the rubble of wartime London, based on Graham Greene's book. Contains sex and mature themes.

programme.title: Burning An Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born Black woman experiences an awakening as she navigates a relationship in Thatcher's London and begins to question everything about love and life.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: As they continue to recover from separate traumatic events, two young men gradually start to fall for each other. Contains reference to child abuse.

programme.title: ...And Justice For All
programme.desc: Al Pacino, an idealistic lawyer trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system, finds himself defending a self-righteous judge. Satirical drama.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Welsh chicken factory worker Helen's life is a grind, until she gets a second chance at love. Heartwarming musical-drama starring Louise Brealey.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage returns from Vietnam to find his childhood friend, Birdy (Matthew Modine) psychologically crushed by the war. Haunting drama. Contains strong language/sex.

programme.title: Burning An Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born Black woman experiences an awakening as she navigates a relationship in Thatcher's London and begins to question everything about love and life.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: In 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is mistaken for a secret agent when a hi-tech tux turns him into a superspy. Jennifer Love Hewitt stars in a gadget-packed action comedy.

programme.title: Super Charlie
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives, who turns out to have actual superpowers.

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: Two interns discover that their bosses have been using modern corporate strategy to disrupt the magical world. Star-studded Sky Original with Christoph Waltz and Sam Neill.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: The cowardly cartoon dog is hungry for adventure with meddling human pals Shaggy and the gang. Spooky fun with Matthew Lillard and Sarah Michelle Gellar. Flashing images.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. team must save Coolsville from all of their past monsters when they are brought back to life by a masked man trying to take down the gang.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship holds the key to Vikings and dragons forging a new future together as an ancient threat rears its head.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds voices the famous Pokémon hero as he puts his sleuthing skills to work to help a 21-year-old find his missing detective father.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: Four teens in detention discover an old video game that sucks them into the dangerous world of Jumanji. Dwayne Johnson stars.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back as Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart and Jack Black return to Jumanji.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before.

programme.title: Super Charlie
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives, who turns out to have actual superpowers.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: Shrunk by the ants he tormented, Lucas must learn to work with the insects, instead of against them. Bugs bite back in this animation from the director of Jimmy Neutron.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A young mystic must learn to control the elements to save his kingdom from a destructive war. Action-packed adaptation of the hit animation. Moderate violence.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds voices the famous Pokémon hero as he puts his sleuthing skills to work to help a 21-year-old find his missing detective father.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Loveable Mogwai Gizmo spawns a new batch of mischievously evil Gremlins, who take over a cable network. Comedy horror sequel with Zach Galligan. Violent scenes.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Book Adaptations
programme.desc: From page to screen, the Cinema List celebrates book adaptations. Featuring Wuthering Heights starring Margot Robbie and Bridget Jones's Diary, see these stories on film.

programme.title: Days Of Thunder
programme.desc: Maverick racer Tom Cruise risks all to become a NASCAR champ, wooing Nicole Kidman between laps. Contains strong language, sexual scenes and flashing images.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when he thought it was safe to get back in the water, Brody (Roy Scheider) must protect Amity Island from another marauding shark. Thriller. Flashing images.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: A Florida theme park has an unwelcome visitor: a Great White with a grudge. Tasty sequel with Dennis Quaid in for a short, shark shock! Violence/sex.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: When genetically-engineered dinosaurs break loose on a remote island, a group of experts are on the menu. Classic from Steven Spielberg. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: In this hit sequel to Jurassic Park, scientists discover a second dinosaur island which has been untouched - until now... Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man trapped inside a magical boardgame is freed with a zoo-full of rampaging jungle beasts. Wild fantasy adventure with Robin Williams.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: King Arthur finds himself in danger of losing his wife Guinevere to the once-loyal Sir Lancelot. Medieval epic with Sean Connery, Richard Gere and Julia Ormond.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Wise-cracking Miami cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence fight to protect a witness and bring down a heroin crook. Action comedy.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone is the cop brought out of deep freeze in 2032 to hunt down his criminal enemy Wesley Snipes. Sci-fi action with Sandra Bullock. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: Pacifist farmer James Stewart strives to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but the capture of his youngest son forces him into action. Moving classic.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood directs his second feature and stars as a hired gun charged with saving a small town from a gang of outlaws. Western starring Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill.

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: A Chinese chef accidentally gets involved with a news reporter who filmed a drug bust that went awry and is now being chased by gangs who are trying to get the videotape.

programme.title: Rumble In The Bronx
programme.desc: Martial arts master Jackie Chan moves to the Bronx to visit his uncle and ends up helping him to combat the gang that have been terrorising his grocery store.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murder, a New York gang must fight its way back to Coney Island. Cult thriller from 48 Hrs director Walter Hill. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: Pacifist farmer James Stewart strives to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but the capture of his youngest son forces him into action. Moving classic.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone is the cop brought out of deep freeze in 2032 to hunt down his criminal enemy Wesley Snipes. Sci-fi action with Sandra Bullock. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: King Arthur finds himself in danger of losing his wife Guinevere to the once-loyal Sir Lancelot. Medieval epic with Sean Connery, Richard Gere and Julia Ormond.

programme.title: The Wild Thornberrys Movie
programme.desc: The animal-loving family heads for Africa, where Eliza discovers unscrupulous poachers are plotting to kill an entire herd of elephants with the aid of a deadly electric fence, leaving her and ever-present pal Darwin to save the day. Animated adventure, with the voices of Lacey Chabert, Tim Curry, Tom Kane, Cree Summer, Lynn Redgrave and Jodi Carlisle.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Shenxiu was abandoned by her mother when she was a child. Since then, she has bad dreams about a monster called Nightmare. One day, she travels on a cruise ship with her family. On a stormy night, she falls and breaks into the fancy Deep Sea restaurant. She meets the Chef, Nanhe, and embarks on a mysterious journey. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Brian Flaccus and Angela Malhotra.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: An incompetent scientist finally invents something that works - a machine that turns water into food. When the device gets launched into the atmosphere, it has a strange effect on his town's weather, causing giant meals to fall from the sky to the delight of the residents - until it gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bill Hader, Anna Faris and James Caan.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: A scientist believes he has saved the world from his invention, a machine that accidentally turned water into food. However, he learns the device is still active and has created a race of food/animal hybrids that he must stop from running wild across the world. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Bill Hader, Anna Faris and James Caan.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A half-human canine is sworn to protect and serve as he faces feline supervillain Petey the Cat. Animated comedy, with the voices of Pete Davidson, Poppy Liu, Lil Rel Howery and Isla Fisher.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyong'o, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog fights alongside Superman in Metropolis, thwarting the evil schemes of arch-nemesis Lex Luthor. Disharmony ripples across Metropolis just as Luthor's former laboratory guinea pig, Lulu, enacts her scheme to abduct the Man of Steel and members of the Justice League. Krypto temporarily loses his abilities and places his trust in a misfit team of newly superpowered animal shelter

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Inventor Wallace and his canine sidekick Gromit have set up a pest-control service, and are called in to stop rabbits overrunning a garden show. However, the pair are overwhelmed when a destructive giant bunny arrives on the scene, while an interfering aristocrat contrives to make matters worse. Nick Park's Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes and Helena

programme.title: The Pirates! In an Adventure with Scientists!
programme.desc: The bungling leader of a band of inept buccaneers is determined to prove his worth to his rivals and win the coveted Pirate of the Year award. An encounter with the naturalist Charles Darwin gives him the chance to pull off a daring crime - if he can survive coming face to face with the pirate-hating Queen Victoria. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Grant, Martin Freeman, Imelda Staunton an

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: A pampered pet rodent is flushed down a toilet and ends up in a vast underground rat city in the sewers of London. He is befriended by a quick-witted rat who offers to help him find his way home, but first the hapless pair have to escape the clutches of an evil toad bent on ridding the rodent metropolis of its residents. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Ian McKellen,

programme.desc: Gabby and Grandma Gigi's road trip takes an unexpected turn when Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, The Internship, to violently destroy the organisation.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: Tasked by Frankenstein to create a companion, Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Cillian Murphy wakes from a coma into a post-apocalyptic world after a virus starts turning humans into crazed killers. Cult horror from Danny Boyle.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun battle a malevolent force when they're sent to investigate the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the brand-new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are truly tricera-top tier.

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: A simple-minded gardener is transformed into a genius, but plots his bloody revenge when he realises he's been exploited. Sci-fi horror with Jeff Fahey and Pierce Brosnan.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: The beloved Ghostbusters franchise gets a feminist spin. Top comedy with Melissa McCarthy.

programme.title: Men In Black
programme.desc: Will Smith joins Tommy Lee Jones for a sci-fi comedy about two secret agents who set out to stop an alien terrorist threatening the planet.

programme.title: Men In Black II
programme.desc: With the scum of the universe menacing Earth, agent Will Smith brings back Tommy Lee Jones to kick alien backside. Out-of-this-world comic sequel.

programme.title: Men In Black 3
programme.desc: Will Smith goes back to the 60s to save his partner from a murderous alien. Sci-fi comedy with Josh Brolin. Mild fantasy violence.

programme.title: Men In Black: International
programme.desc: The Men in Black are back to take down a new global threat - a mole within their own organisation. Starring Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Hit zombie comedy sequel. The group move into the American heartland, and have to face up to new, evolved zombies. With Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: 28 Years Later
programme.desc: Three decades since the rage virus took hold, one survivor leaves the safety of a fortified island on a mission into the mainland.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In an oppressive future society, a wrongly convicted prisoner is forced to participate in a deadly gameshow. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: A group of small but vicious alien creatures called Crites escape from an alien prison transport vessel and lands near a small farm town on Earth.

programme.title: WestWorld
programme.desc: Michael Crichton directs this classic sci-fi thriller about robots going rogue in a futuristic adult theme park. Yul Brynner stars alongside Richard Benjamin.

programme.title: Spin The Bottle
programme.desc: When a group of friends play spin the bottle in a house marked by a brutal massacre, they unknowingly unleash an evil spirit and start dying in terrifying ways.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: A group of friends keep the cameras rolling as a skyscraper-sized monster rampages through Manhattan. Found-footage creature feature. Violence/mature themes.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman involved in a car accident wakes up in a cramped underground bunker with two men she's never met. Tense thriller.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow: Live
programme.desc: Die. Repeat: Army officer Tom Cruise gets stuck in a time-loop that sees him doing battle with aliens time and again.

programme.title: True Romance (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: A pop-culture enthusiast steals cocaine from his new wife's pimp and tries to sell it in Hollywood, prompting the mobsters who own the drugs to pursue the couple.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Rapid-fire action sequel with Mel Gibson and Danny Glover as the bickering cops closing the net on a mob of South African drug smugglers. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: Two Towers
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam meet Gollum on their quest, while good and evil battle at Helm's Deep. Second instalment in the trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, two brothers return to their hometown, realising that an even greater evil is waiting for them.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: When their enemy resurfaces after 16 years, a group of ex-revolutionaries reunite to rescue the daughter of one of their own.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls for a woman from a wealthy 18th-century family. Language/sex/mature themes/flashing images.

programme.title: True Romance (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: A pop-culture enthusiast steals cocaine from his new wife's pimp and tries to sell it in Hollywood, prompting the mobsters who own the drugs to pursue the couple.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Tom Hanks stars as the captain of a container ship that is hijacked by Somali pirates in this Oscar-nominated thriller. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon III
programme.desc: Tough cops Riggs and Murtaugh (Mel Gibson and Danny Glover) return for another all-action adventure in which they must confront a former cop turned crime lord.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: Lonely widower Tom Hanks becomes a reluctant radio star when his young son calls in to a talk show requesting him a new wife. Classic Nora Ephron romcom with Meg Ryan.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: Return Of The King
programme.desc: Frodo reaches Mordor as good and evil do battle. Stunning finale of Peter Jackson's fantasy trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.

programme.title: Promising Young Woman
programme.desc: In this Oscar and BAFTA-winning thriller with Carey Mulligan, a woman pursues her own form of justice after her friend is sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls for a woman from a wealthy 18th-century family. Language/sex/mature themes/flashing images.

programme.title: Lost In Translation
programme.desc: Bored in a Tokyo hotel, Bill Murray and Scarlett Johansson share an unlikely brief encounter. Oscar-winning romance. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: Lonely widower Tom Hanks becomes a reluctant radio star when his young son calls in to a talk show requesting him a new wife. Classic Nora Ephron romcom with Meg Ryan.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A matchmaker is torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex. Romcom with Pedro Pascal and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Cunning cannibal Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) is enlisted to help FBI agent Edward Norton catch an elusive serial killer. Strong language/violence/mature themes.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: The latest mystery thriller by M Night Shyamalan sees a father and his teen daughter attend a deadly pop concert. With Josh Harnett.

programme.title: The Girl On The Train
programme.desc: Adaptation of the hit book starring Emily Blunt as an alcoholic divorcee caught up in a missing person case that sends shockwaves throughout her life.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Rapid-fire action sequel with Mel Gibson and Danny Glover as the bickering cops closing the net on a mob of South African drug smugglers. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Classy, pacy action thriller starring Harrison Ford as an innocent man on the run from a determined cop (Tommy Lee Jones).

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: CIA agent Harrison Ford becomes the target of an IRA revenge plot after he foils a terrorist attack. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: No Country For Old Men
programme.desc: After stealing $2million in drug money, Josh Brolin is hunted by ruthless psychotic Javier Bardem. Oscar-winning crime thriller. Strong bloody violence/strong language.

programme.title: Eye In The Sky
programme.desc: Helen Mirren stars as a no-nonsense British colonel trying to get the go ahead for a drone strike. Thriller with the late Alan Rickman.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Classy, pacy action thriller starring Harrison Ford as an innocent man on the run from a determined cop (Tommy Lee Jones).

programme.title: True Romance
programme.desc: Christian Slater goes on the run with hooker Patricia Arquette and $5m in cocaine stolen from mobster Christopher Walken. Strong language/violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother who goes to a restaurant to meet Henry, her charming date. However, her pleasant evening soon turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When a young girl disappears, a series of past disappearances begin to link together, altering a broken family's history. Thriller.

programme.title: Amongst the Wolves
programme.desc: Danny, an ex-soldier homeless in Dublin, meets Will, a teen fleeing a drug gang. Their encounter forces them to confront their pasts while facing their realities.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Restless
programme.desc: A middle-aged empty nester's mundane life is upended when raucous new neighbours move in next door, unleashing potential danger and disruption.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: Vince Vaughn is the motel keeper with a shocking secret in Gus Van Sant's remake of the terrifying Hitchcock classic. With Anne Heche and Julianne Moore. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Sparks fly when CIA man Ryan Reynolds is tasked with keeping watch over murderous rogue agent Denzel Washington. Action thriller. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: When his neighbour asks him to take care of his cat, a former baseball-prodigy-turned bartender finds himself caught up with gangsters.

Dick, "Minority Report" is an action-detective thriller set in Washington D.C. in 2054, where police utilize a psychic technology to arrest and convict murderers before they commit their crime. programme.title: The Best Man
programme.desc: After writing a soon-to-be bestselling novel, writer and committed bachelor Harper Stewart (Taye Diggs) attempts to hide the fact that his saucy new book is loosely based on the lives and loves of his tight-knit group of friends. Harper is set to be the best man at his friend Lance's (Morris Chestnut) wedding, and all his friends will be in attendance. When an advance copy of the book makes its wa

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: In early-1970s Las Vegas, low-level mobster Sam "Ace" Rothstein (Robert De Niro) gets tapped by his bosses to head the Tangiers Casino. At first, he's a great success in the job, but over the years, problems with his loose-cannon enforcer Nicky Santoro (Joe Pesci), his ex-hustler wife Ginger (Sharon Stone), her con-artist ex Lester Diamond (James Woods) and a handful of corrupt politicians put Sam

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S. is invited to the Smithsonian to receive an award for inventing a perpetual motion machine. Without telling any of his family, he boards a freight train heading to Washington, D.C., to attend the ceremony.

programme.title: The Moon and Back
programme.desc: High school senior Lydia Gilbert feels lost after her father's death, until she discovers a space opera script written by him. Equipped with a VHS camera and pocket change, she decides to honor her dad and make the script a reality.

programme.title: Happily N'Ever After 2: Snow White: Another Bite at the Apple
programme.desc: Snow White (Helen Niedwick) must prevent her father from marrying a scheming witch who wants to rule the kingdom.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Attempting to win the favor of the newly divorced Suzanne (Nia Long), Nick (Ice Cube) offers to accompany her children, Lindsey (Aleisha Allen) and Kevin (Philip Bolden), on a flight from Portland, Ore., to Canada to see their mother. A mishap with a corkscrew and a metal detector gets the troupe banned from the flight, however, so Nick is forced to drive the kids in his prized Lincoln Navigator.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne decide to move to the suburbs to create a better life for children Lindsey and Kevin. The contractor they hired to renovate their home has a rather odd way of doing business, complicating the family's move. Matters spiral further out of control when the contractor clashes with Nick but bonds with Suzanne and the children.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan
programme.desc: Tired of waiting for Mr. Right while her biological clock ticks away, Zoe (Jennifer Lopez) decides it's time to make an appointment at the sperm bank. On the same day as her procedure, she meets Stan (Alex O'Loughlin), a man with the potential to be her ideal mate. When Stan learns that Zoe's unpredictable behavior is the result of her pregnancy, he declares his commitment. As the due date approac

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: A gifted singer/songwriter, Charlotte hires Will Burton, a new guy in town, to manage her fledgling rock band. She wants one thing from him: to help her win a contest against her ex-boyfriend in an upcoming battle of the bands. Charlotte's band comes together and seems to have a real shot at victory, while Will and dynamic guitarist Sa5m begin to make some beautiful music of their own.

programme.desc: A family of dogs decides to go on a holiday.

Though usually unlucky in love, he begins a tentative relationship with a music-loving schoolteacher (Bonnie Hunt), but what really gives him a new sense of purpose is the revelation that his favorite film, "Marty," is being remade.

programme.title: Measure of a Man
programme.desc: A teen develops a bond with a Wall Street executive while learning to stand up to bullies during one life-changing summer.

programme.title: Centurion: The Dancing Stallion
programme.desc: Ellissia adopts a white stallion to train in the art of Mexican horse dancing. As she starts teaching the handsome but previously abused Centurion, Ellissia falls critically ill, which keeps her from competing in a celebrated equestrian event. Under the watchful eyes of her father, new ranch hand Danny steps in as trainer, hoping to win the competition - and, perhaps, Ellissia's heart.

programme.title: A Mouse Tale
programme.desc: At the request of the king, Sebastian (Drake Bell) and Samantha (Miranda Cosgrove) must find a legendary crystal with the power to defeat an army of rats.

programme.desc: A young vegetarian lion is shunned by other carnivores.

programme.desc: Cheyenne realizes the sheriff and his posse include him among the outlaws when he is trapped into traveling with a holdup gang.

programme.title: The Silent Planet
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: True-crime writer Ellison Oswald is in a slump; he hasn't had a bestseller in more than 10 years and is becoming increasingly desperate for a hit. programme.desc: Agent Jack Ryan (Harrison Ford) becomes acting deputy director of the CIA when Admiral Greer (James Earl Jones) is diagnosed with cancer. programme.desc: Soon after moving into a suburban tract home, Katie (Katie Featherston) and Micah (Micah Sloat) become increasingly disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence. programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: True Grit
